subject: AIS符號識別
question: 1. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Own ship symbol — double circle at own ship's reference position

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 2. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Own ship true scale outline — oriented along own ship's heading

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 3. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Own ship radar antenna — cross at physical location of antenna
options.D: Own ship heading line end point

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 4. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.D: Own ship heading line — solid line thinner than speed vector

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 5. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.D: Own ship past track — thick line (primary) / thin line (secondary)

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 6. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Tracked target including dangerous target — circle with dashed course/speed vector
options.C: Own ship outline with speed vector

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 7. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.D: Target in acquisition state — circle segments (bold/flashing/red for auto-acq.)

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 8. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Lost target — triangle with bold solid cross, flashing until acknowledged

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 9. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Selected target — square indicated by its corners around activated target

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 10. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.D: Target past positions — dots equally spaced by time

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 11. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 12. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: AIS sleeping target — isosceles acute-angled triangle, oriented by heading or COG

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 13. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.D: AIS activated target — triangle with course/speed vector

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 14. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Selected AIS target — square corners around activated AIS triangle

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 15. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: AIS lost target — triangle with bold solid cross, flashing, no vector

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 16. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: AIS target past positions — dots equally spaced by time

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 17. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: AIS Search and Rescue Vessel — circle with cross inside AIS vessel symbol

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 18. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.D: AIS-SART — specific symbol indicating AIS search and rescue transponder

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 19. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Selected AIS AtoN — square around activated AIS AtoN symbol

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 20. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Lost AIS AtoN — AtoN symbol with cross, indicating lost Aid to Navigation

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 21. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Associated target — activated AIS target symbol representing radar-associated target

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 22. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Associated target alternative — activated AIS symbol modified with circle around triangle

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 23. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Line of Position (LOP) — thin solid line from charted object towards own ship, labelled with time

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 24. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Monitored route — route being actively monitored, distinct line style

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 25. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 26. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Trial manoeuvre — projected path during trial manoeuvre calculation

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 27. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Simulation mode — indicated when simulation is active on display

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 28. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Cursor — crosshair or arrow indicating current cursor position on display

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 29. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.D: Range rings — concentric circles at fixed intervals from own ship

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 30. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Electronic Bearing Line (EBL) — dashed line from CCRP

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 31. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Acquisition/Activation area — solid line boundary for target acquisition zone

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 32. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 33. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Tidal stream — single line with three arrowheads from charted position

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 34. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Look-ahead alarm highlight — thick red polygon/poly-line on boundary causing alarm condition

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 35. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Danger bearing — bearing line indicating dangerous direction to be avoided

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 36. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Physical AIS AtoN — solid diamond; Virtual AIS AtoN — dotted diamond with crosshair

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 37. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: AIS AtoN — fixed structure offshore/obstruction, solid diamond

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 38. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: AIS AtoN — Racon (radar transponder beacon), type code 2

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 39. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: AIS AtoN Emergency Wreck Marking Buoy — type code 4

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 40. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: AIS AtoN Cardinal North — diamond with 2 triangles pointing upward on top

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 41. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Signal station — diamond centred at reported position

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 42. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Berthing data — box with 'BERTH' inscribed, thick solid line, AIS AtoN colour

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 43. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Tidal flow and water level symbol — arrow for flow direction, gauge for water level

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 44. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Mariner-entered danger — user-defined object indicating navigational danger

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 45. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Plotted position — symbol for position obtained from terrestrial observations

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 46. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: MSI — box with 'MSI' inscribed, area covered by MSI region shown with sparse pattern

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 47. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.C: Meteorological information — circle with 'W' inscribed, wind shaft with barbs

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 48. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Route information — AIS ASM waypoints and leg lines with course labels

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 49. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.A: Area Notice — box 'AN' for point, series of lines bounding area, filled with AN symbols

subject: AIS符號識別
question: 50. The following symbol represents which navigation symbol?

options.B: Air gap — clearance between water surface and overhead structure
